notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm plunked
notableEvents.detail: Alec Bohm hit by pitch. Justin Crawford scores. Trea Turner to 3rd. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott grounds out, pitcher Cole Winn to first baseman Jake Burger.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Marsh pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh walks. J.T. Realmuto to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to second baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bryson Stott pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryson Stott singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Wyatt Langford. Bryce Harper scores. Alec Bohm to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Marsh pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Marsh called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Trea Turner GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner grounds into a double play, second baseman Ezequiel Duran to first baseman Jake Burger. Dylan Moore out at 2nd. Trea Turner out at 1st.
